_comment: Edit this file to make the scanner yours. Nothing else needs touching. By default the filters are OFF (empty) — you get every fresh job for your titles/locations. Turn filters on only if you want them (see README for recipes).
_titleMustMatch_help: Keep a job only if its title contains one of these words. [] = keep every title (default). Set this ONLY if your `titles` search terms are broad.
_titleExclude_help: Drop a job if its title contains any of these words. Example: ["senior", "staff", "intern"].
_jdExcludePatterns_help: Optional deeper filter: reads each job's full description and drops it if a regex matches. Slower (one request per job). [] = off. Example: ["\\b([5-9]|\\d{2,})\\+?\\s*years"].
